{{Quote|Colonel Ekirk is a magnificent officer, don't you think?|[[Galiir Ac Yandar]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:II" />}}
'''Braedic Ekirk''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served the Empire during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The Nightstrike Soldier Hegemony is looking to join the Empire as a full military branch rather than remain a separate entity. I would appreciate an objective observer's opinion as to their efficacy.|Colonel Ekirk, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:II" />}}
Braedic Ekirk was an Imperial [[Officer/Legends|officer]] during the Galactic Civil War between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the Galactic Empire. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the man had achieved the rank of [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] and was [[Imperial Office|stationed]] in the city of [[Dearic/Legends|Dearic]], on the planet [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].<ref name="SWG:II" />

[[File:Ekirk.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Colonel Ekirk idle in his office]]

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Colonel Ekirk was approached by [[Galiir Ac Yandar]], the commander of the [[Nightstrike Soldier Hegemony]] (N.S.H.), a Talusian [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] organization affiliated with the Empire. Ac Yandar was seeking to make his unit a full military branch of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial armed forces]] rather than a separate entity. Galiir Ac Yandar met Ekirk to negotiate the new operational status of the Nightstrike Soldier Hegemony. Although Ekirk deeply despised Galiir, he considered that the N.S.H. could be a valuable asset for the Empire. However, the negotiations were disturbed when [[Slicer/Legends|slicers]] of the [[Aggregate Civil Liberties Organization]] (A.C.L.O.), an anti-Imperial movement, planted information that almost ruined Yandar's reputation with the Empire. Colonel Ekirk thus dispatched a spacer to raid the [[A.C.L.O. office]].<ref name="SWG:II" /> The spacer was recommended by [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] officer [[Dathnaeya Loessin]], who wanted to determine what kind of people the Rebellion and the Empire had chosen to work with.<ref name="SWG:CoA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Crisis of Allegiance|Talus}}</ref> Galiir Ac Yandar ordered the spacer to kill [[Leeta Poandeu]], the slicer who had sliced his system, and then contact and assist [[Mark Hieks]], an N.S.H. [[Spy/Legends|spy]] in the A.C.L.O. office. Ekirk also tasked the spacer with slaying A.C.L.O. terrorists who sabotaged Imperial shipments. The spacer served Ekirk dutifully, achieved all those objectives and was eventually rewarded for the assistance.<ref name="SWG:II" />

Later the same year, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], via an Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]], put Colonel Ekirk in charge of demolishing abandoned buildings throughout the Empire in order to prevent the Rebellion from using them as safe houses. Ekirk contracted [[Galactic Vacant Building Demolitions]] to demolish buildings from orbit using [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|planetary bombardment]] techniques. He also came up with the idea of the [[Galactic Vacant Building Demolishing Movement]], whose job was to provide the Empire with information as to the locations of abandoned buildings.<ref name="MIoLI" /> However, one year later, the project was considered a failure.<ref name="SEO">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68195&month=012009|text="Smoke 'Em Out"|int=Smoke 'Em Out}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Colonel Braedic Ekirk appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:II" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Braedic Ekirk was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Crisis of Allegiance|Crisis of Allegiance]]" arc with the release of "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 2|Chapter 2: The Talus Incident]]," on [[August 1]], [[2006]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Chapter 2: The Talus Incident Publish Notes, August 1st">{{SonyForumsCite|full_url=http://soe.lithium.com/swg/board/message?board.id=DevDiscussion&message.id=58871|text="Chapter 2: The Talus Incident" Publish Notes, August 1st}}</ref> Ekirk later appeared in ''[[Move It or Lose It]]'', a small [[in-universe]] introduction to the [[2007]] [[W:c:swg:House Demolition Program|House Pack-Up event]] in ''Star Wars Galaxies''.<ref name="MIoLI" />
